headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Linde, Raises Price Target to $599
summary: Bernstein  analyst James Hooper   maintains Linde (NASDAQ:LIN) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $561 to $599.

headline: Bloom's Billion-Dollar AI Deal Gets a Brutal Welcome
summary: The company announced exactly the kind of news bulls were waiting for, so why did investors hit the exits.
